action.reasoning: Observation: the latest diagnostic shows visual_attr is null, suggesting the Qwen class stores the vision module under a nested path rather than model.visual, while the training crash comes from self.visual.dtype seeing no floating params after current freezing/wrapping. Analysis: before another patch I need read the full native diagnostic and current source around freeze/loading to identify the exact module path and avoid breaking the working packaged baseline. Decision: run a compact inspection of logs/iter_25/native_diag.json plus relevant source snippets, then patch the minimal training/inference code in the next iteration.
